name: CoinMarketCap
description: Cryptocurrency market data API providing real-time and historical prices, rankings, market cap, volume, OHLCV data, exchange information, and global market metrics.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_map
capabilities.description: Return a mapping of all cryptocurrencies to unique CoinMarketCap IDs.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_info
capabilities.description: Return static metadata for one or more cryptocurrencies including name, logo, and description.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_listings_latest
capabilities.description: Return a paginated list of all active cryptocurrencies with latest market data.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_listings_new
capabilities.description: Return a paginated list of the most recently added cryptocurrencies.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_listings_historical
capabilities.description: Return a ranked list of all cryptocurrencies at a historical snapshot in time.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_quotes_latest
capabilities.description: Return the latest market quote for one or more cryptocurrencies.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_quotes_historical
capabilities.description: Return historical market quotes for a cryptocurrency at regular intervals.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_market_pairs
capabilities.description: Return all active market pairs for a given cryptocurrency.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_ohlcv_latest
capabilities.description: Return the latest OHLCV values for one or more cryptocurrencies.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_ohlcv_historical
capabilities.description: Return historical OHLCV data for a cryptocurrency over a time period.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_categories
capabilities.description: Return a paginated list of all cryptocurrency categories.

capabilities.name: cryptocurrency_category
capabilities.description: Return metadata and cryptocurrencies for a single category by ID.

capabilities.name: exchange_map
capabilities.description: Return a mapping of all supported exchanges to unique CoinMarketCap IDs.

capabilities.name: exchange_info
capabilities.description: Return static metadata for one or more exchanges.

capabilities.name: exchange_listings_latest
capabilities.description: Return a paginated list of all exchanges ranked by 24h trading volume.

capabilities.name: exchange_quotes_latest
capabilities.description: Return the latest aggregate market data for one or more exchanges.

capabilities.name: exchange_quotes_historical
capabilities.description: Return historical market data for an exchange over a time period.

capabilities.name: exchange_market_pairs
capabilities.description: Return all active market pairs for a given exchange.

capabilities.name: global_metrics_quotes_latest
capabilities.description: Return the latest global aggregate cryptocurrency market metrics.

capabilities.name: global_metrics_quotes_historical
capabilities.description: Return historical global aggregate cryptocurrency market metrics.

capabilities.name: tools_price_conversion
capabilities.description: Convert an amount of one cryptocurrency or fiat currency into others.

capabilities.name: fiat_map
capabilities.description: Return a mapping of all supported fiat currencies to CoinMarketCap IDs.

capabilities.name: key_info
capabilities.description: Return API key details and usage statistics.
